quote: I have ordered seven thobes from KhanSaab over four years. Each one feels as if it was made for that single morning.
name: H.E. Sheikh Mansour A.

quote: The wedding bisht arrived with three days to spare and a hand-written note from the master tailor. Heritage you can wear.
name: Yousef Al-Mahmoud

quote: Took the made-to-measure flight from London to Dubai for four fittings. Worth every mile, every minute, every dirham.
name: Karim El-Khoury

quote: Found KhanSaab through their atelier reels. The detail on the gold embroidery has to be seen in person to be believed.
name: Faisal R.
